title: Allow printing of the main board and Gantt chart in PDF (Work Management)
excerpt: I suggest enabling the function to print the main board and Gantt (work management) in PDF. In my case, I had to integrate it into a contract and I couldn’t.

posts.author: hespinoza (Horacio Espinoza)
